## Tags
north, up, upgrade, improve, circle, button

## Categories
arrows, development

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/circle-fading-arrow-up)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CircleFadingArrowUp;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CircleFadingArrowUp { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
